# Elevator Pitch — Ironframe GRC

**One line:** Ironframe turns governance and cyber risk into **defensible dollars**—not heatmap colors—using a zero-trust, multi-tenant platform and an observable 19-agent AI workforce.

**30 seconds:**  
Most GRC tools ask leaders to trust red-yellow-green charts and manual spreadsheets. Ironframe quantifies risk as **Annualized Loss Expectancy in exact cents**, ingests threats through a **sanitization DMZ**, and runs **specialized agents** (scoring, sustainability, vault, audit) on persistent LangGraph memory. CISOs get a single Command Center; auditors get exports and immutable evidence; boards get numbers they can defend.

**60 seconds:**  
Legacy GRC failed finance, security, and AI in the same ways: opaque math, trusted APIs, and black-box LLMs. Ironframe is **control-first**: Irongate sanitizes every external payload; Irontrust runs constitutionally frozen ALE for tenants like Medshield ($11.1M baseline), Vaultbank, and Gridcore; Ironwatch and Ironbloom tie live grid carbon to sustainability ALE in physical units—not greenwashing proxies. When live data drops, **last-known-good pulse loops** keep the UI up. Multi-tenant isolation is enforced at middleware, cookies, RLS, and Ironguard headers. We're GA on modern serverless infra with integration suites that prove the edge behaves like your workstation.

**Ask:** Design-partner or pilot tenant on the Command Center with your industry profile and audit export path.
